{
    "observation_id": 16,
    "instid":275,
    "resultsetting": {
       "uncertaintysetting": [
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "newcrfcalibrationpoint",
                    "fieldname": "masterunit",
                    "variable": "$masterunit",
                    "field_heading": "Master unit",
                    "field_position": "0",
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "no"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "newcrfcalibrationpoint",
                    "fieldname": "unit",
                    "variable": "$testunit",
                    "field_heading": "test unit",
                    "field_position": "0",
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "no"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "newcrfcalibrationpoint",
                    "fieldname": "unit",
                    "variable": "$uucunit",
                    "field_heading": "uuc unit",
                    "field_position": "0",
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_crfmatrix",
                    "fieldname": "leastcount",
                    "variable": "$leastcount",
                    "field_heading": "leastcount",
                    "field_position": 10,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                     {
                    "fieldfrom": "mastermatrix",
                    "fieldname": "leastcount",
                    "variable": "$masterleastcount",
                    "field_heading": "leastcount",
                    "field_position": 10,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "uuc",
                    "variable": "$uuc",
                    "field_heading": "set uuc",
                    "field_position": 2,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "master",
                    "variable": "$master1",
                    "field_heading": "master one",
                    "field_position": 3,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "master",
                    "variable": "$master2",
                    "field_heading": "master two",
                    "field_position": 4,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "averagemaster",
                    "variable": "$averagemaster",
                    "field_heading": "Average master",
                    "field_position": 5,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "error",
                    "variable": "$error",
                    "field_heading": "Error",
                    "field_position": 6,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "repeatable",
                    "variable": "$repeatability",
                    "field_heading": "Repeatablelity",
                    "field_position": 9,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "hysterisis",
                    "variable": "$hysterisis",
                    "field_heading": "Hysterisis",
                    "field_position": 8,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$maxzeroerror",
                    "field_heading": "max zerro",
                    "field_position": 7,
                    "formula": "abs($master2 - $master1)",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "zeropoint",
                    "variable": "$zeropoint",
                    "field_heading": "Zeropoint",
                    "field_position": "0",
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "typea",
                    "variable": "$typea",
                    "field_heading": "type a",
                    "field_position": "0",
                    "formula": "$repeatability / sqrt(2)",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$masterunc",
                    "field_heading": "master unc",
                    "field_position": 11,
                    "formula": "$this->getMasterUncertainty($rowcalibpoint, $testpoint, $testunit)",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "combineuncertinity",
                    "variable": "$combineuncertinity",
                    "field_heading": "Combine uncertinity",
                    "field_position": 12,
                    "formula": "sqrt(pow(($maxzeroerror / sqrt(3)), 2) + pow(($hysterisis / sqrt(3)), 2) +pow(($repeatability / sqrt(3)), 2) +pow(($leastcount / 2 / sqrt(3)), 2) + pow(($masterunc / 2), 2))",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$com",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "pow($combineuncertinity ,4)",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$newtipe",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "pow($typea,4)",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$dof",
                    "field_heading": "Dof",
                    "field_position": 13,
                    "formula": "($com / $newtipe) * 4",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$coveragefactor",
                    "field_heading": "coverage factor",
                    "field_position": 14,
                    "formula": "$this->getCoverageFactor($dof)",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$expandeduncertainty",
                    "field_heading": "Expandeduncertainty",
                    "field_position": 15,
                    "formula": "$combineuncertinity * $coveragefactor",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "cmcscope",
                    "fieldname": "minfrequency",
                    "variable": "$minfrequency",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "cmcscope",
                    "fieldname": "maxfrequency",
                    "variable": "$maxfrequency",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "cmcscope",
                    "fieldname": "mincmc",
                    "variable": "$mincmc",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "cmcscope",
                    "fieldname": "maxcmc",
                    "variable": "$maxcmc",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$interpolatedValue",
                    "field_heading": "",
                    "field_position": 1,
                    "formula": "((($testunit - $minfrequency) * ($maxcmc - $mincmc)) / ($maxfrequency - $minfrequency)) + $mincmc",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "",
                    "fieldname": "",
                    "variable": "$cmc_taken",
                    "field_heading": "cmc taken",
                    "field_position": 16,
                    "formula": "($interpolatedValue > $expandeduncertainty) ? $interpolatedValue : $expandeduncertainty",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                },
                {
                    "fieldfrom": "new_summary",
                    "fieldname": "master",
                    "variable": "$master",
                    "field_heading": "master three",
                    "field_position": "0",
                    "formula": "",
                    "checkbox": "yes"
                }
            ]
    }
 
}

{
  "template_name": "Magnehelic Gauge - Complete Uncertainty Template",
  "instrument_type": "Magnehelic Gauge",
  "description": "Complete uncertainty calculation for Magnehelic Gauge with repeatability, hysteresis, zero error and master uncertainty",
  "fields": [
    {
      "field_name": "calibration_point",
      "field_label": "Calibration Point",
      "field_type": "input",
      "data_source": "newcrfcalibrationpoint",
      "source_column": "point",
      "source_conditions": {
        "id": "{{calibpoint_id}}"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 1
    },
    {
      "field_name": "test_unit",
      "field_label": "Test Unit",
      "field_type": "input",
      "data_source": "newcrfcalibrationpoint",
      "source_column": "unit",
      "source_conditions": {
        "id": "{{calibpoint_id}}"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 2
    },
    {
      "field_name": "master_unit",
      "field_label": "Master Unit",
      "field_type": "input",
      "data_source": "newcrfcalibrationpoint",
      "source_column": "masterunit",
      "source_conditions": {
        "id": "{{calibpoint_id}}"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 3
    },
    {
      "field_name": "uuc_reading",
      "field_label": "UUC Reading",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "value",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "uuc",
        "repeatable": "0"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 4
    },
    {
      "field_name": "master_reading_1",
      "field_label": "Master Reading 1",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "value",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "master",
        "repeatable": "0"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 5
    },
    {
      "field_name": "master_reading_2",
      "field_label": "Master Reading 2",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "value",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "master",
        "repeatable": "1"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 6
    },
    {
      "field_name": "average_master",
      "field_label": "Average Master",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "value",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "averagemaster",
        "repeatable": "0"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 7
    },
    {
      "field_name": "error_value",
      "field_label": "Error",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "value",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "error",
        "repeatable": "0"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 8
    },
    {
      "field_name": "repeatability_std",
      "field_label": "Repeatability (Std Dev)",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "STDDEV_SAMP(value)",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "master"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 9
    },
    {
      "field_name": "hysteresis_value",
      "field_label": "Hysteresis",
      "field_type": "summary",
      "data_source": "new_summary",
      "source_column": "value",
      "source_conditions": {
        "instid": "{{instid}}",
        "inwardid": "{{inwardid}}",
        "calibrationpoint": "{{calibpoint_id}}",
        "type": "hysterisis",
        "repeatable": "0"
      },
      "is_required": false,
      "display_order": 10
    },
    {
      "field_name": "uuc_least_count",
      "field_label": "UUC Least Count",
      "field_type": "matrix",
      "data_source": "new_crfmatrix",
      "source_column": "leastcount",
      "source_conditions": {
        "id": "{{matrix_id}}"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 11
    },
    {
      "field_name": "master_least_count",
      "field_label": "Master Least Count",
      "field_type": "master_matrix",
      "data_source": "mastermatrix",
      "source_column": "leastcount",
      "source_conditions": {
        "id": "{{master_matrix_id}}"
      },
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 12
    },
    {
      "field_name": "master_uncertainty_value",
      "field_label": "Master Uncertainty Value",
      "field_type": "master_uncertainty",
      "data_source": "masterscopematrix",
      "source_column": "cmc",
      "source_conditions": {},
      "is_required": true,
      "display_order": 13
    }
  ],
  "calculations": [
    {
      "calculation_name": "max_zero_error",
      "calculation_label": "Max Zero Error",
      "formula": "abs({{master_reading_2}} - {{master_reading_1}})",
      "depends_on": ["master_reading_1", "master_reading_2"],
      "calculation_order": 1
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "type_a_uncertainty",
      "calculation_label": "Type A Uncertainty",
      "formula": "{{repeatability_std}} / sqrt(2)",
      "depends_on": ["repeatability_std"],
      "calculation_order": 2
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "type_b_zero_error",
      "calculation_label": "Type B - Zero Error",
      "formula": "{{max_zero_error}} / sqrt(3)",
      "depends_on": ["max_zero_error"],
      "calculation_order": 3
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "type_b_hysteresis",
      "calculation_label": "Type B - Hysteresis",
      "formula": "{{hysteresis_value}} / sqrt(3)",
      "depends_on": ["hysteresis_value"],
      "calculation_order": 4
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "type_b_repeatability",
      "calculation_label": "Type B - Repeatability",
      "formula": "{{repeatability_std}} / sqrt(3)",
      "depends_on": ["repeatability_std"],
      "calculation_order": 5
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "type_b_resolution_uuc",
      "calculation_label": "Type B - UUC Resolution",
      "formula": "{{uuc_least_count}} / (2 * sqrt(3))",
      "depends_on": ["uuc_least_count"],
      "calculation_order": 6
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "type_b_master_uncertainty",
      "calculation_label": "Type B - Master Uncertainty",
      "formula": "{{master_uncertainty_value}} / 2",
      "depends_on": ["master_uncertainty_value"],
      "calculation_order": 7
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "combined_uncertainty",
      "calculation_label": "Combined Uncertainty",
      "formula": "sqrt(pow({{type_b_zero_error}}, 2) + pow({{type_b_hysteresis}}, 2) + pow({{type_b_repeatability}}, 2) + pow({{type_b_resolution_uuc}}, 2) + pow({{type_b_master_uncertainty}}, 2))",
      "depends_on": [
        "type_b_zero_error",
        "type_b_hysteresis",
        "type_b_repeatability",
        "type_b_resolution_uuc",
        "type_b_master_uncertainty"
      ],
      "calculation_order": 8
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "degree_of_freedom",
      "calculation_label": "Degree of Freedom",
      "formula": "{{repeatability_std}} > 0 ? (pow({{combined_uncertainty}}, 4) / pow({{type_a_uncertainty}}, 4)) * 4 : '-'",
      "depends_on": ["combined_uncertainty", "type_a_uncertainty", "repeatability_std"],
      "calculation_order": 9
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "coverage_factor",
      "calculation_label": "Coverage Factor",
      "formula": "getCoverageFactor({{degree_of_freedom}})",
      "depends_on": ["degree_of_freedom"],
      "calculation_order": 10
    },
    {
      "calculation_name": "expanded_uncertainty",
      "calculation_label": "Expanded Uncertainty",
      "formula": "{{combined_uncertainty}} * {{coverage_factor}}",
      "depends_on": ["combined_uncertainty", "coverage_factor"],
      "calculation_order": 11
    }
  ],
  "cmc_rules": {
    "rule_conditions": {
      "parameter": "{{instrument_name}}",
      "mode": "{{master_mode}}",
      "location": "{{location}}"
    },
    "interpolation_fields": {
      "test_point": "calibration_point",
      "test_unit": "test_unit"
    }
  }
}
